title: pogostemon fauriei
intro: Pogostemon fauriei, also known as patchouli or Japanese patchouli, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Pogostemon fauriei include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin health, and support the immune system. Pogostemon fauriei is typically prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a dried herb for teas and infusions.
